topic: ratio tables, scaling by powers of 10
latex:
Alexander is trying to solve the following problem with a ratio table. Fill in the last column of the ratio table to answer the question.

If you order $1$ pizza, you will get $8$ slices of pizza. How many slices of pizza are there in $100$ pizzas?

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|c|}
\hline
pizzas & 1 & 10 & \\
\hline
slices of pizza & 8 & 80 & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
